candidate_tokens.decoder_access: sam_mask_decoder.predict_masks returns all native mask tokens; this is diagnostic-only and does not change the standard multimask_output=False inference path

point_definition.automatic: distinct automatic positive prompts that actually enter the decoder after the existing crop filtering and incremental global point-NMS path
point_definition.point_recall: a GT instance is recalled when at least one such automatic point lies within its prepared instance mask
point_definition.background_point: an automatic decoder prompt whose integer pixel coordinate has prepared GT label 0
point_definition.gt_internal_point: per-instance Euclidean-distance-transform maximum; ties choose smallest y then smallest x

coverage_definition.gt_point_ccr: maximum IoU over all four native candidates produced from the fixed GT interior point in every sliding-window crop containing that point
coverage_definition.auto_point_ccr: maximum IoU over all four native candidates from automatic prompts located inside the same GT instance
coverage_definition.auto_conditional_denominator: GT instances with at least one automatic positive point
coverage_definition.candidate_masks: thresholded at 0.0 before candidate selection, NMS, or final assembly

selection_and_error_definition.selected_candidate: the exact standard multimask_output=False candidate before per-crop mask processing, NMS, and final assembly; token 0 unless the existing decoder's enabled dynamic-stability fallback chooses its highest-quality ambiguity token
selection_and_error_definition.good_but_not_final: best native automatic candidate IoU >= main_match_iou and final assembled prediction has no strict match
selection_and_error_definition.candidate_generation_miss: automatic point exists but no associated native candidate reaches main_match_iou
selection_and_error_definition.selection_ranking_miss: a native candidate reaches main_match_iou but no standard selected candidate reaches it
selection_and_error_definition.assembly_nms_conflict_miss: a standard selected candidate reaches main_match_iou but no final assembled prediction strictly matches the GT

supplementary_final_error_definition.boundary_localization: unmatched GT having maximum IoU with any final prediction in (0, main_match_iou)
supplementary_final_error_definition.split: unmatched GT with positive-pixel overlap with two or more final prediction instances
supplementary_final_error_definition.merge: unmatched final prediction with positive-pixel overlap with two or more GT instances

scope.tnbc: p1-p6 and p7-p8 only; report separately by split and patient; p9-p11 forbidden
scope.monuseg: 37 training images only; training-set mechanism diagnosis, not unseen-domain evidence; test14 forbidden
